emails.subject: Corp. Guaranty for Transco
emails.body: Corp. Guaranty for Transco Clement, Attached is the Enron Corp. guaranty for Transco's transportation agreement. We revised the interest language to make it clear we are not subject to double interest and put in a limited performance guaranty for the Company's execution of the transportation agreements. Please review and let me know if you have questions.

emails.subject: RE: Corp. Guaranty for Transco
emails.body: RE: Corp. Guaranty for Transco No questions or comments. To: Abrams, Clement
